title: AkatsukiBot
subtitle: The New Standard for Discord Management
app_desc: AkatsukiBot provides advanced security, AI-powered analytics, and sophisticated management features for modern Discord communities.
features_subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your server
feat_list_free:
・Record VC join/leave logs
・NG word detection (Up to 10)
・Basic Anti-Raid Protection
feat_list_pro:
・Web Dashboard & Theme Themes
・【Iron Fortress】Auto Lockdown
・Customizable Log Colors
・AI Community Health Radar
feat_list_pro_plus:
・Server Branding Tab & Custom Colors
Host-VC Proactive Healing
・AI Strategic Reports (Weekly)
・Support for up to 3 servers
roadmap_subtitle: These features are currently under development and will be released sequentially.
roadmap_audit_desc: Identifies inactive members based on roles, intros, and VC activity.
roadmap_antiraid_desc: Detects mass suspicious joins and automatically restricts server access.
roadmap_introgate_desc: Restricts access until a proper introduction is posted.
help_growth_trend: A graph showing the trend of server joins and leaves aggregated by day.
help_heatmap: Aggregates voice channel activity by hour of day to identify active periods.
help_ng_limit: Define specific keywords to be detected and restricted in messages.
help_antiraid: Automatically detects and restricts suspicious mass joins to protect the server.
help_timeout: The duration to automatically timeout users when an NG word is detected.
help_introgate: Restricts server access until a self-introduction is posted in the specified channel.
help_vc_role: Automatically assigns roles based on cumulative voice channel activity time.
help_vc_report: Periodically sends server activity reports to the designated channel.
help_raid_join: Detects mass joins (raids) when the number of joins per minute exceeds the threshold, and automatically locks the server (raises verification level).
help_newcomer: Restricts messages from new users based on their account age or the time elapsed since they joined the server.
help_advanced_filter: Automatically deletes messages containing Discord invites, suspicious short URLs, or blacklisted domains.
help_quarantine: When a security violation is detected, instead of kicking, it assigns a special quarantine role and directs the user to a specific log channel to mitigate damage.
help_ai_advice: Sends polite AI advice on how to interact with members who haven't been active for a set period.
help_ai_insight: Analyzes weekly server metrics and provides strategic management advice to administrators.
confirm_release: Are you sure you want to release this timeout?
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
plan_free_desc: Use basic management features for free.
plan_pro_desc: Access advanced management and statistics features.
plan_pro_plus_desc: A full-feature plan for large servers.
step1_desc: Invite both 'Akatsuki Bot' and the 'License Management Bot' to the server.
step2_desc: Joining the support server will automatically grant you the initial role.
step3_desc: Run /setup_application in your server and click the 'Apply' button.
step4_desc: An admin will review and approve your application. You'll receive a DM upon completion.
step5_desc: Your license is activated instantly. No commands or key input required.
notice_body:
・Please apply from a server with the License Management Bot installed.
・Applications must be submitted from the BOOTH purchaser's account.
・After expiry, your plan will revert to Free Tier automatically.
main_color_help: Applied to buttons, links, and highlights. Current color:
mod_role_help: Members with this role can be assigned to tickets.
ticket_log_ch_help: When a ticket is closed, the chat transcript (HTML) will be sent to this channel.
ticket_welcome_msg_placeholder: Please describe your issue and wait for staff to respond...
ticket_welcome_msg_help: If empty, a default message will be used.
ticket_cat_desc: Configure categories displayed when a user creates a ticket.
assign_staff_desc: Select a moderator to handle this ticket.
no_categories: No categories registered. Please add one.
confirm_delete_category: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
insight_sections_help: Sections unchecked will be excluded from the report. If all are disabled, no report will be sent.
ai_prediction_desc: AI analyzes message density and NG word frequency in real-time. If it detects a 'tense atmosphere' that could lead to trouble, an alert is sent to the admin channel.
ar_desc: Detect and automatically defend against server attacks and raids. Critical for maintaining safety.
ar_notif_help: Channel to send alerts when raid events are detected or handled.
guard_mode_normal_desc: Standard monitoring and NG word detection only.
guard_mode_caution_desc: Strict newcomer restrictions and suspicious link blocking.
guard_mode_lockdown_desc: Auto-lockdown enabled. Automatically restricting new joins.
newcomer_restrict_help: In Lockdown mode, newcomers are automatically muted until assigned a role.
auto_recovery_help: Returns to Normal mode automatically after 30 mins of peace following a lockdown.
avatar_scrutiny_help: Detects bursts of avatar-less accounts and automatically escalates guard level.
honeypot_help: Instantly BAN users without roles who speak in this channel.
emergency_purge_desc: Wipe messages from recently joined suspicious users in one go.
purge_confirm: Are you sure you want to purge messages from all users who joined in the last {mins} minutes?
ng_esc_help: Actions execute when violation count within the last hour reaches the threshold.
warn_mgmt_desc: Issue warnings from the Member Audit page. Set automated actions for when a member reaches a warning limit.
warn_reason_placeholder: Enter the reason for this warning...
warn_timeout_help: The default timeout duration from log settings will be applied.
leaderboard_help: If disabled, the leaderboard command will be unavailable. XP will still be tracked.
levelup_ch_help: Notifications will be fixed to the selected channel.
welcome_custom_desc: Configure messages sent when members join or leave the server.
mod_log_desc: Select event types and log channels for moderation events.
intro_reminder_label: Incomplete Intro Reminder (DM after N hours)
scanning_server_data: Scanning server data... This may take a moment.
slowmode_help: Automatically sets 10s slowmode when massive NG words or suspicious activity is detected.
aura_system_desc: Assign auras based on VC activity time.
auto_vc_help: Automatically creates a private VC when joining the top channel in this category.
help_auto_vc: A custom VC will be created when you join the top-most channel in this category, and deleted when everyone leaves.
br_mgmt_desc: Manage messages that assign roles when a button is clicked.
br_empty_content_desc: A default description will be generated if empty.
help_mod_log: Detailed logging of moderation events like BANs and message deletions.
help_welcome_msg: Configure custom messages sent when members join or leave the server.
help_warn_mgmt: Configure manual warnings and automated actions when limits are reached.
help_level_stats: XP (Experience Points) system and level-up notification settings.
help_log_settings: Configure destination for system logs and NG word detections.
help_br_mgmt: Create and manage panels that assign roles via buttons.
